site.name: Shankar Binjawadgi
site.title: Shankar Binjawadgi | Product Portfolio
site.description: STEM MBA candidate and product-minded builder focused on AI products, customer discovery, go-to-market strategy, and human-centered product leadership.

about: I am a STEM MBA candidate at the University of Washington Foster School of Business and a product-minded builder with a software engineering foundation. My work centers on AI products, customer discovery, product strategy, and clear go-to-market thinking, with a bias toward understanding real user behavior before shaping solutions.

resume.summary: A concise view of my product, strategy, and technical background across Foster STEM MBA work, NextLeap product management, AWS FinOps, Microsoft Azure engineering, and computer science education.
highlights: MBA candidate in Management Science (STEM) at Foster School of Business
VP of Foster Tech Club and AI product builder
Senior PM-T internship experience in AWS FinOps
Six years of Azure engineering experience across storage, migration, and monitoring

education.name: Master of Business Administration (MBA), Management Science (STEM)

experiences.title: Master of Business Administration (MBA), Management Science (STEM)
experiences.organization: Foster School of Business, University of Washington
experiences.summary: VP of Foster Tech Club and AI Product Builder, focused on product strategy, customer research, AI prototyping, go-to-market thinking, and product leadership.

projects.title: AI Hike Researcher
projects.description: Architected an agentic AI hike researcher that automates real-time trail planning across six safety-critical dimensions, including weather, snow, road conditions, user history, and personalized filtering. Reduced weekly hike-planning time by 98% through staged research and recommendation workflows.

projects.title: Spotify MiniMix
projects.description: Built a GenAI music recommendation workflow in n8n for mood and occasion-based sub-playlist curation, using dynamic song-feature selection to improve recommendation relevance by 73% versus a rule-based baseline in project testing. Documented the product concept through a PRFAQ-style narrative and workflow design.

projects.title: StreakFit
projects.description: Discovered student wellness pain points through six customer interviews and synthesized unmet needs into a behavioral-psychology-informed fitness prototype. Built the initial product experience in three hours at the OpenAI Codex Hackathon to reduce pre-gym friction and improve habit follow-through.

projects.title: Asana Sales Strategy and GTM Assessment
projects.description: Conducted a comprehensive GTM and sales audit of Asana across nine sales-motion dimensions, defining its Ideal Seller Profile and aligning PLG-to-SLG motions with the skills, traits, and enablement needed for stronger enterprise selling. Awarded 1st place for the most comprehensive GTM assessment.

projects.title: HeyLily GenAI Scam-Call Assistant
projects.description: Led an 11-member cross-functional team across design, engineering, and business to build HeyLily, a GenAI scam-call assistant for seniors and Hiya competitor. Ran 15+ user interviews, guided development of an Android call app, and shaped a 5-year B2B2C go-to-market model.

projects.title: Product Teardown Series
projects.description: Launched and facilitated a Foster Tech Club product teardown series that helped students deconstruct world-class products, discuss product strategy, and build sharper product critique skills. Produced three events with 110+ attendees.

projects.title: Roblox Foster Case
projects.description: Proposed Roblox, a user-generated-content platform, as the acquirer for Shutterstock in the Foster Case Competition. Presented a $1.5B valuation and synergy analysis showing how Shutterstock assets could expand Roblox creator tools, content quality, and market share.

projects.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot GTM Strategy
projects.description: Developed a go-to-market strategy for Microsoft 365 Copilot to capture 1% of the U.S. university student market, modeling $2.9M in value over four years. Positioned Copilot as a Gen Z-facing AI productivity product through campus adoption, value messaging, and education-focused GTM tactics.

projects.title: Quantum Tech Partners Gaming GTM
projects.description: Produced four milestone reports on South Korea's gaming sector, covering market sizing, developer and publisher mapping, growth themes, and investment analysis. Turned the research into a prioritized outreach list of six targets to guide 2025 go-to-market planning.

projects.title: SBS Consulting Strategy
projects.description: Developed a structured consulting analysis for SBS, turning client context, market research, and strategic signals into prioritized recommendations, supporting rationale, and an executive-ready presentation.

projects.title: Tech Club Event Marketing
projects.description: Created event marketing assets, posters, and audience-facing messaging for Foster Tech Club programming, translating event goals into clear promotional content and registration flows.

experiences.title: Product Management Fellowship
experiences.summary: Product management fellowship focused on structured product thinking, customer pain-point analysis, and capstone problem solving.

projects.title: Bumble Barney GenAI Wingman
projects.description: Analyzed 100 one-star Bumble App Store reviews, root-caused the recurring 'no matches' problem, and proposed Bumble Barney, a GenAI wingman concept intended to decrease no-match outcomes by 10%. Won 2nd place in the February NextLeap Capstone project.

projects.title: Netflix Circle Wireframes
projects.description: Designed wireframes for a Netflix social discovery concept, exploring how friend circles, onboarding, and recommendation flows could make content discovery more social and habit-forming.

projects.title: Netflix New User Onboarding Journey Map
projects.description: Created a user persona and mapped Netflix's new-user onboarding journey to identify friction points, emotional states, and opportunities to improve activation, personalization, and first-session value. Published the journey map on Figma, where it received 650+ uses and 17+ likes.

projects.title: Figma Product Design Work
projects.description: Collected product design explorations in Figma, including journey maps, wireframes, and interface concepts that show product thinking across discovery, interaction design, and user experience.

experiences.title: Senior Product Manager Technical Intern, L6, AWS FinOps
experiences.summary: Worked on AWS FinOps cost optimization strategy, customer discovery, roadmap prioritization, and PRFAQ-style product definition.

experiences.title: Software Engineer 2, L62, Azure Storage, Migrate, and Monitor
experiences.summary: Built and led work across Azure Storage, Migrate, and Monitor, with experience spanning developer experience, distributed systems, UX performance, incident workflows, and cross-team delivery.

projects.title: WSLBlobNFS PowerShell Module and Package Distribution
projects.description: Spearheaded 0-to-1 development and launch of a Windows CLI client using WSL2 virtualization for Azure Blob NFS, unlocking a new Windows user segment and onboarding 150+ B2B customers. Packaged and distributed the module through PowerShell Gallery to improve discoverability, installation UX, and adoption for Windows users.

projects.title: BlobNFS Troubleshooting Tool
projects.description: Built troubleshooting tooling to diagnose Azure Blob NFS issues, collect useful logs, and support faster root-cause analysis for users and Azure support workflows.

experiences.title: Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science
experiences.summary: Graduated with a 9.5 CGPA, ranked in the top 5% of the class.

projects.title: Sketch-to-Image GenAI Tool
projects.description: Built a GenAI tool that transforms hand-drawn sketches into realistic images using Convolutional Neural Networks and Generative Adversarial Networks. Won 2nd place in the final-year project competition for applying computer vision and generative modeling to creative image generation.
